rationale: Fresh task-close validation from repo truth only. Initial and pre-report git status --short were clean; HEAD c87e595962a5df630a22e211afe310d936e8e3e4 tree 75f303d0673612b82c959387b9845c7379fe8bb4. TASK-083 acceptance satisfied: bootstrap/resume/taxonomy prompt assets live under skills/codewiki; source owns loaders/orchestration via src/application/skill-assets.ts, src/application/prompt.ts, src/bootstrap.ts, src/templates.ts, and resume command code; /wiki-resume preserves follow-up intent; resume prompt includes selected task, artifact-status evidence, holders/waiters/session usage context, and helper-safe next steps; package files include skills and source-owned package audit checks required skill assets; smoke tests passed for prompt asset reachability and stale-reference misuse. Scoped audit evidence cited exactly as required: audit:alignment, audit:changed, audit:task, audit:generated-parity. audit:changed emitted a transient generated-file warning after refresh, then generated file was restored and clean status reconfirmed before this report; product code unchanged during validation.
checks: git status --short — clean before validation start
codewiki_state refresh=true taskId=TASK-083 — health green; TASK-083 loaded
git show 1f74fe2 and c87e595 — expected TASK-083 implementation and graph refresh commits inspected
codewiki_audit profiles=alignment,changed,task,generated-parity task_id=TASK-083 — alignment pass, task pass, generated-parity pass, changed warning for generated file mutation during audit
audit_reports: codewiki_audit profiles=alignment,changed,task,generated-parity task_id=TASK-083 — warning overall; alignment pass, changed warning for .codewiki/index_graph.json generated-file change during audit, task pass, generated-parity pass

isolation_requirement.reason: Task-close and publication validation require independent validator context, a clean worktree, and immutable content proof.

audit_requirement.reason: Gateway profiles require deterministic audit evidence for their build or boundary context.

isolation.notes: Fresh validation from repo state and specified files/commits, not prior chat. Clean confirmed before writing validation artifact; only validation artifact written afterward.
